subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 220111325/663580106 is not a GRB
body:
A. von Kienlin (MPE) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 220111325/663580106 at
07:48:21.49 UT on 11 January 2022,
tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not a GRB.  The event is likely
due to an SGR event.

For Fermi GBM data and info, please visit the official 
Fermi GBM Support Page: https://fermi.gsfc.nasa.gov/ssc/data/access/gbm/ "
